overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding world game showing a red-haired character in a black robe exploring a richly decorated gothic interior. The character moves from a common room with green stained glass windows through a dark stone corridor into a grand hall with potion stations and magical lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room corner with large green stained glass windows

events.description: character turns right away from the stained glass window to explore the room

agents.ego_description: approaching a glowing artifact on a pedestal before turning to walk deeper into the room

entered.detail: large arched window with green circular panes casting colored light onto the floor
ornate wooden pedestal with a brightly glowing magical object on top
tall ornate stone columns flanking the stained glass window
large circular rug with intricate heraldic patterns on the wooden floor

segments.scene_description: The character stands before a large green stained glass window illuminating a gothic common room corner. After approaching a glowing artifact on a central pedestal, the character turns right to explore deeper into the room, revealing stone pillars and ornate rugs.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic common room with red velvet furniture and house banners

events.description: another student in glasses walks past the camera from left to right temporarily blocking the view
approaching the wall with hanging tapestries and framed portraits

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room past red couches and study areas, heading toward the back wall with portraits

notable_agents.action: student with round glasses and dark hair walking past the camera
student in white dress standing near the back wall by the fireplace

entered.detail: plush crimson velvet couches arranged in seating areas around the room
wall decorated with colorful vertical house banners and tapestries
white marble bust on a circular pedestal
wooden paneled wall covered with framed portraits and paintings

segments.scene_description: The character explores a spacious gothic common room furnished with red velvet sofas and decorated with house banners. Other students are scattered throughout, some sitting at study tables. The character passes a marble statue and approaches a wall covered with portraits, while another student walks past the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone staircase with gothic arches

events.description: entering the dark stone corridor from the lit common room
approaching the brightly lit archway at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the worn stone stairs through the dimly lit gothic corridor toward the light

entered.detail: heavy stone gothic archway marking the entrance to the corridor
narrow passage with rough stone walls and dim torch lighting
worn stone steps ascending upward through the corridor
high vaulted ceiling with pointed gothic arches

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the common room and enters a narrow, dark stone corridor with gothic vaulted ceilings. Torch sconces provide dim illumination as the character ascends the worn stone stairs, approaching a bright archway at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with potion brewing stations and magical greenhouse

events.description: emerging from the dark corridor into the brightly lit great hall

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall and approaching the potion crafting station

entered.detail: large decorative stone archway marking the entrance to the grand hall
wooden workbench with potion brewing equipment, ingredients, and cauldrons
large glass conservatory structure with glowing green magical light inside
magical floating candles and chandeliers providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark corridor into a vast grand hall with high ceilings and magical lighting. The space features potion brewing stations, a large glass greenhouse glowing with green light, and floating candles. The character walks toward the potion crafting area in the center of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy, dimly lit gothic common room through a dark transitionary passage and into a luminous, expansive grand hall. It begins by approaching a glowing artifact beneath a large green stained glass window, before turning to navigate a spacious lounge filled with red velvet sofas, house banners, and students at study tables. As the character passes a marble statue and a wall of portraits, the scene shifts from the warmth of the common room into a narrow, dark stone corridor with vaulted ceilings and dim torchlight. The camera then ascends worn stone stairs toward a bright archway, finally emerging into a vast hall characterized by floating candles, a glowing green greenhouse, and central potion brewing stations.
